description: This file implements a MySQL repository for managing personas and their versions, including creation, retrieval, updating, and draft/final persistence functions.

methods.name: createPersona
methods.description: Creates a new persona record, optionally creating the first version if personaJson is provided.

methods.name: getPersonaById
methods.description: Fetches a persona record by its ID.

methods.name: updatePersona
methods.description: Updates persona metadata such as title and timestamp.

methods.name: createPersonaVersion
methods.description: Creates a new version of a persona, assigning a version number if not provided.

methods.name: listPersonaVersions
methods.description: Lists all versions of a persona in ascending order.

methods.name: getLatestPersonaVersion
methods.description: Retrieves the most recent version of a persona.

methods.name: saveDraft
methods.description: Saves a draft JSON for a persona.

methods.name: getDraft
methods.description: Retrieves the latest draft for a persona.

methods.name: saveFinal
methods.description: Saves a final JSON version for a persona.

methods.name: getFinal
methods.description: Retrieves the latest finalized persona JSON.
